steps.title: Use the distance clue
steps.content: Tequipan is described as hundreds of kilometers southeast of Tenochtitlan. Because of that location, goods from Tequipan could reach the capital only after a long overland journey.

steps.title: Choose the edge-location word
steps.content: Choice A means not noticeable, choice B means hidden, and choice C means close or estimated. None explains the long trip to the capital. The remaining word means located at the edge or outer part of something, which fits Tequipan's distant position within the empire. The answer is D.
